entry.title: Re: Local annotations are reflecting in sap smart controls
entry.content: why your table has no column at all?

entry.title: Re: Sap Customer checkout Monitor Inconsistent status for...
entry.content:
Hi, I have not seen this error before but maybe "EA" refers to the unit of measure of items and could be an error related to its configuration in CCO or SBO.

In the context of a POS "EA" could refer to "Each". This is a common unit of measurement used to count individual items. For example, if you are selling loose products like cans of soda or chocolate bars, the unit "EA" would indicate that each item is counted individually.

entry.title: Re: Report recurring entries?
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Consuming ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model OData Service in Asynchronous Mode
entry.content:
Hi @shalabh_jain 

Any idea if the OData service is developed in on-premise SAP ECC system using SEGW then will this same procedure work?

Thanks,

Mainak

entry.title: Re: CPI ftp / iflow: how to start post processing after ftp transfer of multiple files is completed
entry.content: Still shouldn't be the responsibility of the middleware to invoke the trigger.

entry.title: Launch Material Consumption dialog from custom POD plugin
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working on a custom POD plugin in SAP DM that reads values from a pH meter. I have a need to launch the standard Material Consumption plugin in a dialog box from within my custom plugin, showing a list of materials associated with the current phase and allowing consumption of said materials. 

I know that we can launch POD plugins from a production process, but am not familiar with how to launch a plugin directly from my custom plugin. Is this possible? Can anyone point me to some documentation or an example of how to do this? 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Using API in F110 for BANK PAYMENT
entry.content:
Hello,

I can't help you with personal experience of this implementation.
However, maybe this is the right starting point for you on the SAP Help Portal: APIs for Invoice Management 

Best wishes
Christina

entry.title: Re: Question: How to restrict access to EnableNow in rega...

To confirm this, please check the release of the Gateway and the features supported by the same.

Shalabh

entry.title: Unable to create New storage type with template- Default storage type
entry.content:
Unable to create New storage type with template- Default storage type 

OR

Change the Storage Type Template in CBC


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to create New storage type with template- Defa...
entry.content:
It's not possible to create the Storage Type as Default Storage Type with Configuration Activity: Create Storage Types Using Templates. 

Note

You can't create or change storage types with the default storage type template. This template is used by SAP Best Practices to create storage types that are needed for certain warehouse processes, such as:

  • Goods receipt
  • Goods issue
  • Clarification
  • Scrapping
  • Production supply

entry.title: Re: One easier way to deal with com.adobe.ProcessingException
entry.content: Wonderful details... used your post similar issue many times.

entry.title: Re: JBOSS 8 Compability
entry.content:
More info from the Product Owner:

Customer may want to consider stay on JBoss 7.x (or use tomcat 9), which is using Jakarta EE 8 namespace.

Newer versions (JBoss 8, Tomcat 10) switched to Jakarta EE 10, which is incompatible with Jakarta EE 8, this is the fundamental problem.

entry.title: Digital manufacturing Product Master Data Transfer
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have set up an integration between a SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition # system and aSAP Digital Manufacturing #system. All according to thisSAP Digital Manufacturing for execution Integration | SAP Help Portal guide. The integration scenarios seem to be working correctly and we have been able to send over multiple production orders and Master Data objects such as routings and work centers and . However with the transfer of products/materials we run into a problem.

To run the master data transfer scenario we used the app "Replicate by Object Selection" in the public cloud system. All the transfer that we have done were going great on the Public Cloud/outbound side. However on the DM/Inbound side we ran into problems. The first problem that we had was that the transfer was successful, on the "Integration Message Dashboard" app in DM, the transfer was logged as complete. However we could not find the product in our manage materials app. We read somewhere that this might be due to the plant having a different name in DM than in the PC system. So we made another Plant in DM and gave it the same name. After we had done that the "integration Message Board"(DM) no longer game the message Completed after we ran the  "Replicate by Object Selection" (PC) job. Instead it gave the

Error Detail: Error on creation of master data objects. The full responds Payload is at the end of this message.
Does anyone have a clue on how to solve this problem or where the error might come from>
 
With kind regards,
Robin van Buiten
 
 
Responds Payload:
{
"errorCode": "masterData.download.fail",
"message": "com.sap.dme.exception.ApiServiceException",
"messageI18nKey": "request.masterData.error",
"messageInEnglish": "Error on creation of master data objects",
"errorLocation": "INTERNAL_SYSTEM_ERROR",
"serviceName": "dme-product-ms",
"eventType": "sap.dsc.dm.Material.Received.v1"
}

entry.title: Re: Test Scripts not available in Manage your test Processes
entry.content: Hello, is this still the most current one? Is there a version with all test cases for 2502?

entry.title: Re: NF-e Technical Note 2018.005 - Technical Responsible
entry.content:
Hi PerettoM,

I had a similar question on a client that I am providing services. They have opened a ticket to SAP and they answered that they couldn't be the Technical Responsible, and this is also written in the KBA 2780735: "Note that if you use SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil 10.0 (SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica), SAP will not provide the CSRT code."

Therefore, the fiscal team had to register their own IT team and tax ID (Brazil CNPJ) as Technical Responsible for client's BR invoices, and then SEFAZ PR sent the CSRT. We did a test recently after waiting for SEFAZ Homologation to synchronize and invoice tests got approved correctly.

If you have any further questions you can ask.

Best regards.

entry.title: Join two Custom Analytical Queries in a single Query
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

We need a solution to combine two Custom Analytical Queries into a single query to generate the required report for our organization.

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Join two Custom Analytical Queries in a single Query
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

There is no option to add multiple data sources in the Custom Analytical Queries app. Instead, you can add multiple sources in a custom CDS view using the Custom CDS Views app. 

Therefore, the suggestion for you is to first complete your table configurations in the Custom CDS Views app and once it's good to be exposed in a Query, then you should create it in the Custom Analytical Queries app.

In your case, you have 2 Custom Analytical Queries. Therefore, you have two Custom CDS Views that are on the top of these queries. What you need to do now is to join these two Custom CDS Views to create a new one and then create a Query on the top of this new one.

Please keep in mind that both Custom CDS Views need to have unique fields that you can use to join them.  When you create a Join Condition inside a Custom CDS View, SAP has a button that says "Propose Join Condition" and the system will provide you a suggestion of elements to join both views.

 

Kind regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: AdobeSign Integration with Successfactors for Recruiting offer letter
entry.content: Hello Jisha, were you able to solve this? Do you receive the documents back to SFSF. We're looking into integrating with AdobeSign as well. Thanks!

entry.title: Errors on revision date in curriculum connector
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to add items to curiculum through the curriculum connector. But I have got errors about the revision date. The system does not find the item because of the revision date. 

However, I did put the correct revision date in the format: 2025-01-10 04:54:00
In the LMS, the item does not indicate the seconds in the revision date. So I put 00 for the seconds. But I have the impression that the system doesn't recognise the corresponding items and above all it's as if it's adding 0.
Here's the error I got:

Entity does not exist.Item: ComponentTypeID:PRES, componentID:PRES INT_TO_003, revisionDate:2025-01-10 04:54:00.0

 

Could someone help me?

 

Thanks in advance.

Best regards.

entry.title: Filter Limit in SAC
entry.content:
Hi!

It's possible that when I filter a cost center, not all of them appear, but rather according to another filter that is being filtered? For example, I selected the company x filter, and the ccost filter only shows what belongs to this company, and not the entire dimension? (This is when I add a member).

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to upload TAN exemption data in BP
entry.content: did you get solution for it?

entry.title: How to get a list of Features (and TRs) for a scheduled Deployment?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Cloud ALM Community,

We are very excited about the new Deployment feature in Cloud ALM. In fact, for us, it is a must-have feature for our on-premise systems.

However, we were disappointed that there's no easy way of checking which features would be taken for the upcoming deployment. If I understand correctly, I would need to take the list of projects from the deployment view, go to the Features view, and individually get a selection of the features in the appropriate status, for each project, one by one. This is not very practical.

The concrete requirement is, we want to get to a list of transport requests, to run our transport checks using our 3rd party tool. We also want to compare the list of transport requests that was actually imported with the list the should have been imported...

Thank you!
Bruno

entry.title: Are there now SAP S/4HANA Best Practices for Retail available?
entry.content:
Hello

are there now SAP S/4HANA Best Practices for Retail available? At the moment only the “SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA” seem to be available for the industry version!

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Connecting to MySQL from CAPM application
entry.content: Hi Gregor,

entry.title: Re: Connecting to MySQL from CAPM application

entry.title: Re: SAP Forward 2025 - ASSUMTEK: Um olhar para o futuro do SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Parabéns pelo evento pessoal, excelente!

entry.title: Re: JBOSS 8 Compability
entry.content:
That is the problem, the SAP BOE Product is the core product that all of the SDK's, Java, .NET, RESTFul are all built off of. So SAP has the same problem you have, because "they" changed the functionality and therefore the backward compatibilities it's the same issue that SAP has with upgrading. BOE is a huge project and not easy when it comes to third parties changing/upgrading to new work flows or API's, platforms, etc.. So like you it would cause SAP to do a major rewrite to support the newer platforrms. And then of course it's a backward compatibility issue for exisitng Customer installs. That's why Product is suggesting to stay on the existing platform, the one that works, for now. There are 1000's if installs that would break if SAP upgraded.... So like you, it's not that easy to upgrade...

FYI - the Platform info has been updated...

entry.content:
Hi we have a value in a table like -0.00064.

But show it without the komma figures. Like -0. 

Is it possible not to display the minus before the 0 in sac?

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Eclipse IDE (SAP BW/HANA) Problems In Linux
entry.content:
We have just noticed, that there was a typo in the parameter. Sorry for that. It should be:

-Dbwmt.awt.mode=1

Can you please try that?

entry.title: Issues with Recording Simulations in Microsoft Edge – Extensions and JavaScript
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’ve been experiencing an issue with recording simulations in the browser, specifically in Microsoft Edge, since today. Normally, everything works fine, but now I’m receiving an error message saying that the 'SAP Enable Now, Desktop Application Recorder' extension is required and JavaScript needs to be enabled.

I’ve confirmed that all necessary extensions are installed and activated, yet the problem persists. When I record through the SAP Business Client, it works without any issues.

Has anyone encountered a similar problem or have any idea what could have changed in the Edge settings overnight?

I’d appreciate any help or suggestions!

entry.title: Re: Connecting Shopify to CAPM Issue
entry.content:
Hi Manoj, Can you please try to create a connection hook point via package.json and use the end points in the service implementation?  

"cds": {
    "requires": {
      "weatherservice": {
        "kind": "rest",
        "credentials": {
          "url": "https://api.openweathermap.org",
          "requestTimeout": 30000
        }
      }
    }
  }

you may find the sample code to consume rest API in CAP here

entry.title: Re: Migration of Interview Scheduling using Microsoft Out...
entry.content:
Hi,

We have recently replaced out Outlook integration to Work Tech to include MS Teams for interview scheduling.  This is making a lot more sense to us to have all the integrations in Work Tech but we also found that is was optional. 

If you turn on the integration in Work Tech, make sure you disable the one in Outlook Integration, otherwise you will have conflicts.

As for using the same credentials in test and production, we have it this way and have no issue.  We only have a production Outlook/MS Teams so we didn't have a choice and it is working fine.

Good luck with your enhancement.

Pascal Lajoie

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Performance Analysis Tool
entry.content:
Hello, 

Did someone already used the "Throughput cells per second" column and how it should be interpreted (alone and with other indicators)?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Parallel Processing with Background Jobs in SAP
entry.content:
@Jelena_Perfiljeva  Thank you for your valuable feedback!

Actually, the purpose of the program is to demonstrate how parallel processing can be used for long-running operations (such as record creation, data updates, etc.). Here, I simply presented the method; it is entirely up to the users to determine how and in which scenarios they will use it.

Of course, parallel processing may not be necessary for data reading alone. However, in scenarios involving large-scale data processing, document creation, or updates, this method can be highly beneficial for improving performance. At this point, to minimize the impact of spawning too many jobs on system performance, precautions such as job limits or queue management can be implemented.

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content: Dear Erick, the issue has been analyzed internally by us and our colleagues across teams. We can assure you that there was no issue found within the mobile app of SAP Mobile Start itself. Instead, the issue was identified to originate from the integration of SAP Build Apps and SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition. Our colleagues are working with highest priority to resolve the issue and will update this post once a resolution is reached. For further concerns or other feedback, you can always reach out to sapmobilestart@sap.com.

entry.title: Re: Asset Accounting - "No Operating Concern has assigned...
entry.content: Thanks, I had the same problem than farisk and It worked for me...

entry.title: Re: Data Transpose in SAP Datasphere using Union Operation
entry.content:
this is a mess...

you need to do 11 union nodes that are a mess to manage.

just use a SQL script view and save the result in a table with a transformation flow (in memory SQL execution), this will have far better performances than using union inside a dataflow (that is executed as separated service! and every instantiation of the base table means a different read from the base table => possible network bottleneck).

just use SERIES_GENERATE_INTEGER() function or use the standard calendar pre-delivered views to do the reverse pivot.

entry.title: Re: The email address control does not recognise an incor...
entry.content:
Hey @ValentynaF ,

Could you please give more brief on your issue. Even if I can not someone could be able to help you better.

I tried to enter email in incorrect format on "Candidate Account Creation" Page. But I am able to see error as "Invalid Email Address". PFB screenshot:


Thanks,
Rohit

entry.title: Smartform table empty line on some printers
entry.content:
Hi

We are printing our quotations using smartforms.

For displaying the item details, we use a table. When all the items fit within a page, we are good. When we print out/preview quotations where the item table spans across two pages, i get a blank line at the end of the first page. This happens only when printing through specific printers.

I tried with the below printers, configured in the system

  • Windows default printer - blank line appears
  • ZPDF - blank line appears
  • LP01 - no blank line appears

Please note there are no blank lines in the internal table containing the data. Just on the output.

After much search, i found this solution https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/space-rows-in-table-on-smartforms/m-p/12439419/highlight/true#M1998558 

During my analysis, i have discovered that when i alter the font size of my paragraph, depending on the printer it works.

I have figured out how i can get the details of the printer selected for printing. I have also figured out how i can update the form style at runtime or use a control variable to use texts with different paragraph formats, depending on the printer used. For example: I can do a mapping saying, "if device is LP01 use the style/format with font size 9 pts. If device is ZPDF use the style/format with font size 10 pts". This will work, in the current state of the system.

But, i would like to know if there is a specific parameter of the printer can i look at, to specifically understand if this parameter is in this range, use style with font size N etc., For example: (Please forgive me if the terms i use are incorrect/invalid) If the DPI of the printer is 100-200, use the style with font size 9, If the DPI of the printer is 201-300, use the style with font size 10 etc., In this example, DPI is the parameter. And it will be helpful, if anyone can point out how to retrieve this parameter. 

Meanwhile, I am currently diving through various RSPO* FMs and the structures in their packages, to see if there is any way to retrieve the printer properties. 

Your help is much needed and appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP ASE error log message : Use lastsave as start point for scan
entry.content:
Hello

We recently upgraded ASE to Adaptive Server Enterprise/16.0 SP04 PL06 HF1/EBF 31044 SMP/P/x86_64/SLES 12.4/ase160sp04pl06x/3636/64-bit/FBO/Thu Jun 27 20:17:29 2024.

Since the upgrade we noticed messages like following show in Error log :

Use lastsave as start point for scan (588895,26).

There is no timestamp  with the message. We are not sure what is generating the message.  There are no issues with ASE.  I cannot find mention of this in any SAP ASE documents .  Has anyone else seen this message and can indicate where it comes from ?

entry.title: Resumão: SAP Developer News, February 20th, 2025
entry.content:
Hey All!

Segue resumo do SAP Developer News 20/02/2025

 Fonte: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LM-GzsbM1Uc&t=366s e já deixe seu like por lá e se inscrevam para acompanhar essas novidades!

Os desenvolvedores SAP tiveram uma semana emocionante com o anúncio das capacidades da Joule AI para ABAP. Esta grande atualização introduz recursos inovadores projetados para aprimorar o desenvolvimento ABAP no Eclipse (ADT). Além disso, várias atualizações importantes e oportunidades de aprendizado foram reveladas para o SAP BTP e Terraform. Vamos explorar os destaques das últimas notícias para desenvolvedores SAP.

Capacidades da Joule AI para ABAP

Um dos anúncios mais significativos é o lançamento da Joule para ABAP, uma melhoria há muito esperada impulsionada por IA para o ecossistema de desenvolvimento ABAP. A Joule, que já foi demonstrada em edições anteriores do SAP TechEd, finalmente está disponível para os desenvolvedores. Isso marca um avanço significativo na modernização do desenvolvimento ABAP, tornando a codificação mais eficiente e assistida por IA.

Principais Recursos:

  • Assistência aprimorada por IA para o desenvolvimento ABAP no Eclipse (ADT).
  • Suporte da liderança ABAP, incluindo Sonia, Alex e Simona, que publicaram blogs detalhando como começar a usar a Joule.
  • Tutoriais no YouTube: Mais de 20 vídeos serão lançados no canal SAP Developers no YouTube, fornecendo guias detalhados sobre os recursos da Joule.

SAP BTP ABAP Trial – Disponibilidade Futura

Embora a Joule já esteja disponível, os desenvolvedores que desejam testá-la no BTP ABAP Trial precisarão esperar. A SAP está atualmente trabalhando em uma solução para torná-la acessível a um público mais amplo. Atualizações regulares sobre o progresso serão fornecidas.

Conferência ABAP CONF – Expandindo o Conhecimento dos Desenvolvedores

Para os desenvolvedores que desejam aprimorar suas habilidades em ABAP, a conferência ABAP CONF continua sendo um recurso valioso. A conferência disponibiliza reprises de sessões de eventos no YouTube, ajudando os desenvolvedores a se manterem atualizados com as últimas tendências e melhores práticas do setor.

Terraform no SAP BTP – Uma Nova Oportunidade de Aprendizado

A SAP está expandindo suas ofertas para infraestrutura como código com o Terraform. Um novo curso gratuito de treinamento sobre Terraform para SAP BTP foi lançado, fornecendo aos desenvolvedores conhecimento fundamental sobre:

  • Gerenciamento de recursos de forma declarativa.
  • Uso do Terraform CLI e APIs.
  • Implementação de melhores práticas para automação no SAP BTP.

Entidades Externas CDS – Acesso a Dados Graváveis

Uma atualização importante no SAP BTP ABAP environment 2502 é a introdução das entidades externas CDS graváveis. Anteriormente, as entidades externas no ABAP só podiam ser lidas. Agora, os desenvolvedores podem:

  • Modificar fontes de dados externas usando operações SQL como INSERT, UPDATE, MODIFY e DELETE.
  • Conectar-se a SAP HANA, sistemas não SAP HANA e sistemas remotos AS ABAP.
  • Manter a integridade dos dados por meio de mecanismos de conexão de serviço, garantindo que as transações remotas permaneçam desacopladas das transações locais.

Atualizações no Repositório de Diagramas de Solução do SAP BTP

O Repositório de Diagramas de Solução do SAP BTP recebeu melhorias, incluindo:

  • Ícones redimensionáveis para maior personalização.
  • Ícones atualizados do SAP Cloud Identity Service.
  • Novas bibliotecas para ícones genéricos da SAP e BTP SaaS. Essas atualizações tornam mais fácil a criação de diagramas arquitetônicos profissionais.

As últimas notícias para desenvolvedores SAP destacam avanços revolucionários para desenvolvedores ABAP e SAP BTP. Com a introdução da Joule AI para ABAP, novos recursos de aprendizado como o treinamento em Terraform e melhorias nas entidades externas e nos repositórios de diagramas de solução, a SAP continua inovando no espaço de desenvolvimento. Fique atento para mais atualizações à medida que essas ferramentas e recursos se tornarem mais amplamente disponíveis!

Grande Abraço e até mais!

entry.title: Re: The email address control does not recognise an incor...

entry.title: Re: Eclipse IDE (SAP BW/HANA) Problems In Linux

entry.title: View admin center on successfactors sales demo system
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I am trying to setup and test integration to successfactors  via rest APIs .

To finalize such integration through a certificate based authentication I need to manage certificates in the Security Admin Center .

I have access to a trial successfactors sales demo system https://hcm-us10-sales.hr.cloud.sap/sf but I was not able to view admin center . 

Is there any hint to achieve that? Is there any other Successfactors sales demo system that could be reached with Admin roles for  test purposes ?  

Best regards,

Tesnim

entry.title: Re: JBOSS 8 Compability
entry.content: There may be "1000's if installs that would break if SAP upgraded" however another view is that there are 1000's of installs that are unable to move on from legacy application instance because SAP will not provide a modern version of there libraies.

entry.title: Re: The email address control does not recognise an incor...
entry.content: Hello, client needs to see the error message immediately when entering an incorrect email like it works to first and last name now. It will improve an experience with screen readers

entry.title: Re: Working with RAP BO Events end-to-end - Event-driven-architecture - Event framework
entry.content: Nice blog. Very helpful!

entry.title: Screen Personas Slipstream engine – Footer Buttons not visible
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We want to adapt the QM01 for mobile devices, which actually works very well. We integrate the customized QM01 into the Launchpad using the Slipstream engine. So far, this works es well.

But what's driving me crazy are the buttons on the Footer. When I use the webgui they are visible (print screen 1) but when I open it via the Slipstream Engine service (print screen 2) they are not.

If I take the buttons from the footer into the screen, I can see them, but it looks different depending on the screen resolution (print screen 3 and 4).

Is there a tip on how to get the buttons in the footer in Slipstream Engine visible?

Print screen 1 Webgui

 

Print screen 2 - Slipstream engine on Phone

 

 

Print screen 3 - Phone 1

slipstream engine

Print screen 4 - Phone 2

 

I am grateful for any input.

Best Regards

Simon

entry.title: Re: Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Learning Forum
entry.content: Are you logged into the system before you hit the submit button? You have an account as you are able to comment, just curious to see what the problem is.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Message Monitoring Logs Report

Hi,

Can we configure and test with trail account?

Thanks,

Veera

entry.title: Re: $Batch Operation in OData for Account(CXXBOItem)
entry.content:
Hello,
Could you please tell you item object you are trying to add using batch operation?

Thanks,
Ravi A

entry.title: SBPA: Integrate different projects in visibility dashboard
entry.content:
Dear community, 

Let me first describe some context: 

  • I have 5 projects which all have one or multiple business processes. 
  • A launchpad is set up to start the business processes and see tasks in the Inbox App

My question now is:
How to set up and configure a visibility scenario dashboard without doing so for each project individually? 
Why do I want this?
I'd like to avoid to configure and maintain

  1. a visibility scenario per project
  2. multiple tiles for each visibility scenario dashboard in the launchpad.

My thoughts were to create a new project exclusively for this visibility scenario, where I import the said projects as an dependency. Unfortunately, I get the error stating: "The operation could not be performed due to missing permission.". 

Could somebody share their thoughts on this?
Why do I get the error "Acces denied"? And if there exists a workaround to integrate all business processes in one (1) dashboard.

Looking forward to your feedback. 
C.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse IDE (SAP BW/HANA) Problems In Linux
entry.content:
I would suggest to create an incident on the component BW-MT.

Please ensure to attach all details and screenshots that you shared here as well.

Please mention in the incident, that you discussed with me on this platform. Once you created the incident please share the incident number.

You can do it here via comment, or you can send it to me via "Private message".

Thanks.

entry.title: C4C Error message by clicking the excel button in the Forecast Administration
entry.content:
Hello,

When opening the forecast in the Forcast Administration workcenter by clicking on the XLS icon,

some user(s) get the following error message

They have recently downloaded and installed the latest version of the MS Excel AddIn.

When i follow the same steps i do not get that message.

Does any body know if there are any additional settings that need to be made and how it can be done?

Many thanks in advance for your feedback.

MJ

entry.title: Re: REFX Infinite Building (perpetual term): contract master data & postings (public cloud)
entry.content: Hi Cedric, you have mentioned today this is managed in Excel. I am interested in how Excel performs an NPV calculation based on a term of 999 years. The discounting of payments over such a very long period of time is the problem during the calculation of the net present value. Have you tried it already with a probable end in 50 years (your mentioned standard term)? Best regards, Anja

entry.title: Re: How to Grey Out an Attribute or Attribute Value in SAP CPQ?
entry.content: Hello @Denis 96 We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no further updates under the topic. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions. Best, Eric Silva

entry.title: Re: Migration of Interview Scheduling using Microsoft Out...
entry.content:
Hi Pascal,

Thank you for your comment. I was able to perform the integration via Work Tech for the first time, and here is my scenario.

I connected the integration "Outlook and Teams for Online Meetings." After that, I went to "Set up Interview Scheduling Outlook Integration" as I found a KBA that mentioned having both integrations may cause some issues (same I think the escenario you had) . Then, I went to Manage Recruiting Settings under Microsoft Integrations with Interview Scheduling and tried to click "Verify and connect," but I encountered the following error:

"errorId=null, timestamp=null, errorMessage=ServiceApplicationException occurred while validating RCM EAS Validation for TEAMS_ONLINE_MEETING, server=91pc57bcf200, versionInfo=Release%3A%20%2020250208075305%0AServer%3A%2091pc57bcf200%0ATimestamp%3A%202025-02-18T13%3A29%3A44.616%2B0000"

I resolved the error by configuring "Set up Interview Scheduling Outlook Integration." After setting it up, I was able to complete the connection in "Manage Recruiting Settings," and while the Teams information did not appear in the email right away, everything worked fine the next day.

Let see if someone from SAP can clarify if it is necesary or no, I think in the implementation guide it said that is mandatory.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Why sap:external-function is not allowed in the Cloud?
entry.content: Thanks for the feedback. Could you say more about the adjustment needed?

entry.title: Re: The email address control does not recognise an incor...
entry.content:
Hey @ValentynaF ,

You can write the rule onChange event in order to validate the field for email address.

Post deployment of rule, in case of entering incorrect email entry you could see the error as below:

However, this rule wont work while account creation of candidate.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: BADI not found in Delivery note item level
entry.content:
Hi jpriya,

I am not sure if you got the chance to check the Help: Business Add-Ins (BAdIs) for Delivery Management

The equivalent Item level BAdI is listed there

You mention you expect the BAdI to be called on Display Delivery, but that is unlikely as no change is taking place.

I don't remember all the triggers, but seems like it is Save, PGI, reverse PGI, or change like to the description field of the item, you would need to test this 

I hope this helps.

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: Background Data is updated in Candidate Profile but not updated in Background section in Applica
entry.content: Hey Gi Explorer,

entry.title: Re: Errors on revision date in curriculum connector
entry.content: @lilymar, as it stands, it's not related to Learning not recognizing the "00" in the revision date, but the seconds being wrong. In the Learning Administration area, the Learning Administrator needs to make sure that the time pattern displays hours, minutes, and seconds to avoid this kind of problem when dealing with the Learning Connectors. Here you can find additional details: KBAs 2168610, 2074322, and 2175518.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse(HANA Development): Error when searching for a...
entry.content: Hi, thanks a lot for this hint. In you case, how did you rename the most recent one ? I've seen only one duplicated JAR in my folder, which is the logging_1.2.0

entry.title: Re: Background Data is updated in Candidate Profile but n...
entry.content:
Hey @Gi ,

It is best practice for candidate to complete all the essential fields prior to submission of job application. However, I would suggest a potential solution.

You could include the respective fields again in the Job Application template with the same field ID's which were used in candidate profile. I suspect, since the field ID will be same in both templates, it will assist in making data visible on job application page.

Thanks,
Rohit

entry.title: SKU for new VPN Connections for SAP RISE S/4HANA
entry.content:
Subject: New VPN Connections for RISE Private Edition

Hi everyone,

Context:

Our customer wants to connect three new countries to RISE Private Edition, which will involve three new connections to a Hyperscaler.

They will need three additional VPN Site-to-Site connections.

The customer is already running SAP S/4HANA RISE but currently has no available VPN connections. All five existing VPN connections are already in use.

The customer intends to purchase additional connections for the three new countries.

Questions:

  • What is the SKU for the connection package?
  • How many VPN Site-to-Site connections are included with the connection package SKU?

entry.title: Re: Background Data is updated in Candidate Profile but n...
entry.content: Thanks for your response. We enabled quick apply and late stage application to avoid candidate having to be required to complete those fields upfront to lessen time spent applying to job. Recruiter wants to review those fields prior to interview step if candidate ends up completing those fields after they quick apply. Aside from the API integration and making these fields required upfront, any other solution?

entry.title: Re: Eclipse(HANA Development): Error when searching for a...
entry.content: Thanks for the detailed response. Unfortunately, I only see one of each of these .jar files, so I guess I don't have duplicates or different versions

entry.title: Re: Datasphere: Table Function - Union with Tuple instead...
entry.content: Thanks. I tried that already, but the system didn't know about the table.

entry.title: Re: Update on Reference Solution Architecture for SAP Master Data Governance
entry.content: Excellent blog! Very detailed & informative.

entry.title: Re: Bad Request Error while creating SAP BTP Process Integration Runtime instance using Terraform
entry.content: @rihan_siddiqui - Nope. I don't have a solution to this. Since the BTP CLI does not show the Process Integration runtime, I am assuming that CLI does not have the capability to access Process Integration runtime instance or many any and all instances. So, I have resorted to creating them manually.

entry.title: How can I remove bullets from the creation, search and report options in the ITSM menus?
entry.content: How can I remove bullets from the creation, search and report options in the ITSM menus? ITSM 7.2 SPS20

entry.title: Re: cl_gui_frontend_service=>file_save_dialog not support...
entry.content: For WebGui application, look first at KBA such as  2547717 - ITS Up/Down: Only Z: drive available no local drives (like C:) and 2249454 - ITS Up/Down: Using the WEBGUI File Browser

entry.title: Re: Best practice on Updating a live Talent Pipeline (Rec...
entry.content:
Hey @ellende-paep ,

I could not locate specific best practices for you here. But, here is feedback I can offer to your questions.

  1. Copy the existing talent pipeline and make your changes in the copied version ==> Please don't copy existing talent pipeline for just adding a new status. It is not recommended because newly created talent pipeline will expect the creation of new Job Requisition Template. It is always one to one mapping. Adding a new status in pipeline is not a big deal, it can be performed on existing talent pipeline too.
  2. Copy the job requisition template and link the new talent pipeline? ==> Answered above, It is usual that clients sometime request addition or removal. But it is not recommend to achieve this by creation of new template and pipeline. It will create additional overhead by increasing the number of JRDM templates from the system.
  3. Post the new job requisition template including the new talent pipeline (and unpublish the old job requisition template but don't make it inactive as candidates already applied)  ==> Not Recommende
  4. Don't deactivate the old talent pipeline and old job requisition template (as candidates already applied to it) ==> This is good option, I will suggest below steps.

Add new status : No issues, If the status is non-mandatory. 

It will be issue if you marked the status as mandatory because then the status will be applicable for currently open Job requisition too. If it is optional then can be skipped even after the visiblity.

Remove Existing Status:  Please export a report on the status which you are planning to remove. and follow-up with the respective owners to expediate the process to move the candidates into other statuses. Post having assurance of no candidate there based on report, you can HIDE  status. Please don't delete, just remove the visiblity.

Updating Existing Status: This also can be performed on existing Talent Pipeline, The configuration changes would influence in-flight requisition too. Unless there are significant changes in the pipeline, it is not recommend to create new talent pipeline.

Above feedback is based on my experience 🙂 . I hope it will be useful for you...

Thanks,
Rohit

entry.title: Re: Background Data is updated in Candidate Profile but n...
entry.content:
Hey @Gi ,

Got it,

Since you have enabled Quick Apply and mentioned fields are part of candidate profile, the mentioned fields are not visible upfront to candidates.

It is always recommended to use different job application template for "Quick Apply" requisitions. If you are already having dedicated application template for "Quick Apply" applicant, then I would suggest to migrate the fields to candidate application template and make them visible at later stage for candidate during hiring process.

This way, the data would also get captured by avoiding to collect those at the time of application itself.

I hope this workaround would assist you.

Thanks,

Rohit

entry.title: Re: Generative AI capabilities in ABAP— Your Input Needed
entry.content: Hi Pedro 👋🏼 Yes, S4HC, public is synonymous with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, pubic edition (developer user), so they should be available to you. Reach out to your account executive if you need assistance enabling these features in your development environment. We look forward to seeing how you leverage these new capabilities!

entry.title: Date format error using time between
entry.content:
I need help for the below one.
I need to calculate hours between one date object which is already defined and current date

When I am trying to use this formulae
Vassign time and current date are formatted in this format = FormatDate([Assign Time]:"MM-dd-yyyy
hh:mm:ss a")

=(TimeBetween([V Assign Time];[Current Date];SecondPeriod)/(60*60))

I am getting below error
The expression or sub-expression at position 14 in the 'TimeBetween' function uses an invalid data type.

entry.title: sybase asa 17 run webserver error webservice CALL PROCEDURE
entry.content:
run demo.db:

"C:\Program Files\SQL Anywhere 17\bin64\dbsrv17.exe" -c 8m -n demo17 "C:\Users\Public\Documents\SQL Anywhere 17\Samples\\demo.db" -xs http(port=8098;maxrequestsize=70m;LOPT=ALL,HEADERS;LOG=D:\WEB.LOG) -zoc clientinfo.txt -qn


create procedure:

CREATE PROCEDURE "DBA"."Z_calltable"( IN
@table_name char(128)

)
RESULT( "column_name" char(128) )
BEGIN
--select * from `[@table_name]`;
select * from table ref(@table_name) as t;
END;

create webservice:

CREATE SERVICE "z_get_col" TYPE 'RAW' AUTHORIZATION OFF USER "DBA" URL ON AS call "z_calltable"(:tname);


brower http web address:

http://127.0.0.1:8098/z_get_col?tanme=Counters


error:

SQL error: The variable '@table_name' cannot be NULL in this context.

entry.title: Re: Fiori My Inbox - Step 6. Implement the BADI for updating the decision
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are on S4H 2023 FPS 1 on-prem and I configured flexible workflow for My Inbox - Approve Purchase order to the extend I could get my head around it. I specifically came here from Note https://me.sap.com/notes/2736559/E which kind of mentions, that a comment (approve or reject comment on My Inbox) will not be reflected in the respective MM document (here a purchase order)

My questions:

  1. Is this still correct or does (also for on-prem) flexible workflow now support writeback of the comment to the MM document? If so, where is it visible on-prem in GUI ME23n?
  2. If we need to take care ourselves to write back the decision to the MM document, is /IWWRK/BADI_WF_BEFORE_UPD_IB the right place to do?

Kind regards

Jens

entry.title: Re: Payment Method not viewable in APP Manage Supplier Line
entry.content:
Hello,

to explain, you have two options for entering the payment method:

  • For the company code:
    In the Manage Business Partner Master Data app (F3163), you can specify one or more payment methods per company code. This is valid for all supplier line items of the business partner in this company code.
  • For the invoice item:
    In addition, you can maintain a payment method in the Manage Supplier Line Items app (F0712). This payment method is specific the invoice item. It overrides the payment method maintained on company code level.

In the Payment Method column in your screenshot in the Manage Supplier Line Items app, you see the value entered for the invoice item. Therefore, if this field is empty, it tells you that the payment method on company code level is valid. However, you have to navigate into the Manage Business Partner Master Data app to see which payment methods are entered for the supplier.

I hope this is clarifies your situation.

Best wishes
Christina

entry.title: Re: Generative AI capabilities in ABAP— Your Input Needed
entry.content: Thanks. Yes, but in public could we can programing ABAP in BTP ABAP environment and directly on the stack. My question is if its possible to use Joule in on stack option.

entry.content: Que resumo incrível, @AdrianoCWB! Foi um grande prazer te conhecer no evento, vamos por mais!

entry.title: Re: Date format error using time between
entry.content:
what type is [Assign Time]?
If it is a String, you must first convert it to the date type using ToDate(   ).

entry.title: Re: Background Data is updated in Candidate Profile but n...
entry.content: Hey @Gi , Got it, Since you have enabled Quick Apply and mentioned fields are part of candidate profile, the mentioned fields are not visible upfront to candidates. It is always recommended to use different job application template for "Quick Apply" requisitions. If you are already having dedicated application template for "Quick Apply" applicant, then I would suggest to migrate the fields to candidate application template and make them visible at later stage for candidate during hiring process. This way, the data would also get captured by avoiding to collect those at the time of application itself. I hope this workaround would assist you. Thanks, Rohit

entry.title: Re: Bad Request Error while creating SAP BTP Process Integration Runtime instance using Terraform
entry.content:
Hello,

I was able to actually solve this.

So, in short, btp provider does not have the capability to create process integration runtime service instance since it is done in CF environment. To do this I used the cloud foundry provider.

entry.title: Re: 4 ways to get controls inside a Fragment
entry.content: Thanks for this blog, extremely useful. I had a question on controls inside a fragment that are dynamically generated within lists. For example, a table control that expands dynamically with input fields and checkboxes that grow and shrink, sapui5 appends -__clone## (# - is some dynamic number, eg. -__clone10). In cases like this we don't know what this number will be based upon how long the list is. Now if an event is fired on a control in that lists line item, the oEvent will give us the control id, but how do we get the control ID for another control on the same line item?

entry.title: Google Gemini Responses as Channel alerts in Slack using SAP Cloud integration
entry.content:
Integration with Google Gemini

  1. Setup the Gemini API using the link - Google AI Studio for Developers 
  2. Create the API key after signing up to Google API Studio – copy it and save it(will be used in the IFlow later)

 

 

Creation of Slack Channel

  1. Go to - Slack API URL

 

  1. Signup to Slack & create a workspace in Slack - Slack Workspace
  2. Once done, go to ‘Your Apps’.

 

 

  1. After creating the App, it navigates to the Channel, where the App will be visible. Get the Channel ID of the app and keep it safe(to be used later in the IFlow)

 

 

  1. Inside your app, go to ‘OAuth & Permissions’

 

 

  1. Go to ‘Scope’ & click on ‘Add an OAuth Scope’ under Bot Token Scopes with Auth Scope – ‘chat:write’

 

 

  1. Now install the OAuth Token to your app.

 

 

  1. Copy the token and keep it safe(Later will be used in the IFlow)

 

 

Cloud Integration Design & Configuration

  1. Go to CPI tenant -> Monitor -> Integrations & API -> Security Material -> Create ->Secure Parameter

 

 

  1. Give the Bot token generated in your Slack App as the Secure Parameter & Deploy.

 

 

Design of the IFlow

  1. Create the IFlow as below.

 

 This is going to be triggered from Postman. Hence place HTTPS sender adapter from the ‘Sender’.

HTTPS Configuration

 

 

Content Modifiers

Set the Header in the “Content Modifier”. Give the Google Gemini API key generated in the earlier step.

 

Set the Message Body as follows:

 

Body :

{

"contents": [{

"parts":[{"text": "${in.body}"}]

}]

}

 

Set the Request-Reply to connect to the Receiver via HTTP.

 

Address - https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1/models/gemini-1.5-flash:generateContent

JSON to XML Converter

 

Message Mapping Step:

This step is added to remove the extra content from API response.

XSD structure:

<xs:schema attributeFormDefault="unqualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema">

  <xs:element name="root">

    <xs:complexType>

      <xs:sequence>

        <xs:element name="candidates">

          <xs:complexType>

            <xs:sequence>

              <xs:element name="content">

                <xs:complexType>

                  <xs:sequence>

                    <xs:element name="parts">

                      <xs:complexType>

                        <xs:sequence>

                          <xs:element type="xs:string" name="text"/>

                        </xs:sequence>

                      </xs:complexType>

                    </xs:element>

                    <xs:element type="xs:string" name="role"/>

                  </xs:sequence>

                </xs:complexType>

              </xs:element>

              <xs:element type="xs:string" name="finishReason"/>

              <xs:element type="xs:float" name="avgLogprobs"/>

            </xs:sequence>

          </xs:complexType>

        </xs:element>

        <xs:element name="usageMetadata">

          <xs:complexType>

            <xs:sequence>

              <xs:element type="xs:byte" name="promptTokenCount"/>

              <xs:element type="xs:short" name="candidatesTokenCount"/>

              <xs:element type="xs:short" name="totalTokenCount"/>

              <xs:element name="promptTokensDetails">

                <xs:complexType>

                  <xs:sequence>

                    <xs:element type="xs:string" name="modality"/>

                    <xs:element type="xs:byte" name="tokenCount"/>

                  </xs:sequence>

                </xs:complexType>

              </xs:element>

              <xs:element name="candidatesTokensDetails">

                <xs:complexType>

                  <xs:sequence>

                    <xs:element type="xs:string" name="modality"/>

                    <xs:element type="xs:short" name="tokenCount"/>

                  </xs:sequence>

                </xs:complexType>

              </xs:element>

            </xs:sequence>

          </xs:complexType>

        </xs:element>

        <xs:element type="xs:string" name="modelVersion"/>

      </xs:sequence>

    </xs:complexType>

  </xs:element>

</xs:schema>

 

 

Content Modifier

Add the content modifier to extract the content through XPath under the Exchange Property.

 

XPath where the content lies is: /root/candidates/content/parts/text

Add the expression calling the property in the ‘Message Header’

 

Now the Google Gemini API response should be ready at this stage.

Next, we create design specific to “Slack Adapter”

  1. Set the Template for the message to be displayed in the Channel App calling the content which is set in the Exchange Property in the above step.

 

 <!channel> Hey! Here is your response to your query:

${property.Text}

  1. Now, set the property to capture the body from the previous step by adding another Content Modifier.

 

 

Slack Adapter:

  1. In the Connection Tab, give the secure parameter maintained in the Security material for Slack.

 

 

  1. In the ‘Processing’ tab, give the Channel ID copied from the Slack App.

Method Group - select Chat

Method – chat.postMessage

 

  1. Save & Deploy.

Testing in Postman

 

 

Slack Chatbot:

 

 

Hope you find this blog informative! Happy Cloud Integration Learning! 😊

Cloud Integration SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Re: Brazilian Localization on S/4HANA
entry.content: There is no note

entry.title: E-Learnings for SAP LeanIX Integration with SAP Signavio or ServiceNow are available.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Signavio Community, 

SAP Business Transformation Management Value Map, along with the SAP LeanIX Academy team, is excited to announce we have released E-Learning sessions for SAP LeanIX Integrations, ServiceNow and SAP Signavio.  These E-Learnings are hosted on the SAP Enterprise Support Academy.

What are the sessions about?

Explore how to set up out-of-the- box integrations and ensure your repository maintains meaningful, up-to-date data, through automated processes. You’ll learn the core concepts to advance features with step-by-step tutorials.

 What are the session goals?

Course:  SAP LeanIX Integrations:  ServiceNow

  • Understand the fundamental concepts of the integration between SAP LeanIX and ServiceNow.
  • Navigate the integration process effectively, including configuring data mappings and synchronization modes.
  • Use integration features like Fact Sheets, Relationship Mapping and Synchronization.
  • Leverage the integrated ecosystem to streamline IT operations, enhance collaboration, and realize the obsolescence risk management use case.

Course:  SAP LeanIX Integrations:  SAP Signavio

  • Establish the integration without any coding.
  • Learn how to map your data from SAP Signavio to SAP LeanIX.
  • Understand how to benefit from SAP Signavio data in SAP LeanIX.

How to access?

NOTE:  You MUST be registered with the SAP Enterprise Support Academy in order to access the “direct links” to these courses below (and can do so right here if not currently registered).

Get started with SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value Maps here. (Check out our step-by-step instructional video  on how to join SAP Enterprise Support Academy and Value maps.)

Direct link to the new E-Learning courses (once registered as stated above).

  • Course:  SAP LeanIX Integration:  ServiceNow
  • Course:  SAP LeanIX Integration:  SAP Signavio

Do you need additional help?

Don't hesitate to get in touch with our team using the following form. (Please select the "Business Transformation Management" topic).

Regards, 

Leean De Loria

entry.title: Re: Sap Customer checkout Monitor Inconsistent status for...
entry.content: Hi Ricardo , Your response is really great . And your guess was really helpful and we were able to find the issue for the given error message using your suggestion . Yes it's all about EA . When creating Articles in Sap customer checkout manager EA had been inserted as the UOM but in SAP Business One there is no UOM called EA . There for in the inconsistent entry's item details need to remove the EA from quantity type code and then the error removes from the entry . So Thanks a lot for helping our matter and Appreciate your intention to support us . Thanks and Best Regards, Tharindu .

entry.title: How to freeze a key figure for period of time?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In IBP, if a key figure needs to be freeze for exemple 3 months like march, april and may, than go back to normal. How can I freeze the keyfigure for just this period of time? 

In my especific case it a keyfigure of transfer 

Thank in advence,

Alicia

entry.title: Re: Crate Workorder for the PM/QM notification by using BAPI "BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN"
entry.content:
Hi,

I also have the same requirement and when I tried the same as you mentioned, I am getting error stating "Method name CREATEONOTIF in method table is invalid".

Please help how to rectify this error and create the Order successfully.

 

Thanks in Advance,

Poongodi

entry.title: Re: Upgrading the SAP Cloud Connector for Windows OS
entry.content:
Hi guys,

after an upgrade from 2.12.0 to 2.17.2 I encountered a problem trying to start the SCC. Even using a different path importing after the installation the connections backup an error was raised:

2025-02-21 16:08:10,600 +0100#INFO#com.sap.scc.ui#https-jsse-nio2-8443-exec-4#          #Backup upload successful -- restoration will be completed upon restart
2025-02-21 16:08:10,728 +0100#INFO#com.sap.scc.ui#https-jsse-nio2-8443-exec-3#          #restoring backup archive
2025-02-21 16:08:10,732 +0100#ERROR#com.sap.scc.ui#https-jsse-nio2-8443-exec-3#          #error when restoring backup archive 
com.sap.scc.servlets.RequestFailureExecution$InvalidRequest: A backup version 2.12.0 is not legitimate. It predates the earliest version of the Cloud Connector that introduced the backup feature.

 

After a while I find the note 3507144 - SAP Cloud Connector Restore issue fails with "Restoring backup archive failed" - SCC 2.12.
Using the 2.16.2 the upgrade was successful using the steps provided in the blog.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Background Data is updated in Candidate Profile but n...
entry.content: Hi RohitMohite-the mentioned fields are part of candidate profile which they can access upfront when creating their account but we did not make those fields required. Under manage templates, we have Candidate Profile template, Job Application template. Are you suggesting we have one additional one called Quick Apply? I am trying to understand what you are describing. Is there a KBA tied to this?

entry.title: Course assigned to a Curricula is not showing to the end user
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

We have a SCORM course assigned to a Curricula and when we launch the curricula all the other items show properly to the end users but this specific one doesn't. When we try to assign only this course to the end user, then it's showing.

Do you have any thoughts to share about this?

 

I appreciate any help.

 

Thanks,

Mariane.

entry.title: Re: How to freeze a key figure for period of time?
entry.content:
Hi Alicia,

Please check the editability horizon functionality.

Best Regards,
Lingaiah

entry.title: Re: ABAP: Fast JSON Serialization
entry.content:
Hi @TimoStark. I would be happy if you could include my lib to your benchmark 😃

https://github.com/abapify/json

Inspired by your article I decided to utilize identity transformation with all the possible features, but introduce an extra transformation for custom names support like camelCase -> CAMEL_CASE

Do you have may be any existing code which does this comparison?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Errors on revision date in curriculum connector
entry.content: Thanks for your help. I changed the date and time format as suggested. I could then see the seconds of the item revision date. But it still does not work. The connector is still adding another "0" at the end of the revision date : Record to be Rejected since ref value for Item was NOT found - ComponentTypeID:PRES, componentID:PRES INT_TO_003, revisionDate:2025-01-10 16:54:31.0, approved:null

entry.title: Re: Business Calc Amount total 0 in Executive Review
entry.content:
Hi @Roman_Cruz 

I would create a ticket to support (which will most likely forward it to engineering) for this. I have never seen this and I can't think of any good reason for this difference.

All the best,

Xavier
